name: EU Taxonomy alignment disclosure (mandatory minimum: 0%)

regulatory_anchors.article: Article 5 (disclosure for products pursuing environmentally sustainable investments); Article 6 (disclosure for products promoting E/S characteristics)
Article 2a (added by Taxonomy Regulation; mandates Taxonomy-alignment disclosure within SFDR Art 8/9 documentation)

summary: Tests whether the project documents the proportion of investment that is EU-Taxonomy-aligned, with explicit numbers (a disclosed 0% is acceptable — it is the disclosure that is mandatory, not a minimum alignment). Article 9 products often (but are not required to) report higher Taxonomy-aligned proportions; PB scoring does not impose a minimum here, only requires a defensible disclosed number.
successor_regime_note: Under proposed SFDR 2.0 (Commission proposal COM(2025) 841, tabled 2025), the SFDR / Taxonomy disclosure interface is expected to be tightened to avoid double-counting between the two regimes. PB Art 8/Art 9 verdicts issued under methodology v3.3 are stamped to SFDR v1 (Reg 2019/2088 as consolidated 09/01/2024) and remain valid as of date of issue.
